	<span>
		🎨 Z-Image
	</span>
</h2>
<p><a href="/Tongyi-MAI/Z-Image/blob/main/teaser.jpg" rel="nofollow"><img src="/Tongyi-MAI/Z-Image/resolve/main/teaser.jpg" alt="Teaser"></a>
<a href="https://cdn-uploads.huggingface.co/production/uploads/64379d79fac5ea753f1c10f3/RftwBF4PzC0_L9GvETPZz.jpeg" rel="nofollow"><img src="https://cdn-uploads.huggingface.co/production/uploads/64379d79fac5ea753f1c10f3/RftwBF4PzC0_L9GvETPZz.jpeg" alt="asethetic"></a>
<a href="https://cdn-uploads.huggingface.co/production/uploads/64379d79fac5ea753f1c10f3/HiFeAD2XUTmlxgdWHwhss.jpeg" rel="nofollow"><img src="https://cdn-uploads.huggingface.co/production/uploads/64379d79fac5ea753f1c10f3/HiFeAD2XUTmlxgdWHwhss.jpeg" alt="diverse"></a>
<a href="https://cdn-uploads.huggingface.co/production/uploads/64379d79fac5ea753f1c10f3/rECmhpZys1siGgEO8L6Fi.jpeg" rel="nofollow"><img src="https://cdn-uploads.huggingface.co/production/uploads/64379d79fac5ea753f1c10f3/rECmhpZys1siGgEO8L6Fi.jpeg" alt="negative"></a></p>
<p><strong>Z-Image</strong> is the foundation model of the ⚡️- Image family, engineered for good quality, robust generative diversity, broad stylistic coverage, and precise prompt adherence. 
While Z-Image-Turbo is built for speed, 
Z-Image is a full-capacity, undistilled transformer designed to be the backbone for creators, researchers, and developers who require the highest level of creative freedom.</p>
<p><a href="https://cdn-uploads.huggingface.co/production/uploads/64379d79fac5ea753f1c10f3/kt_A-s5vMQ6L-_sUjNUCG.jpeg" rel="nofollow"><img src="https://cdn-uploads.huggingface.co/production/uploads/64379d79fac5ea753f1c10f3/kt_A-s5vMQ6L-_sUjNUCG.jpeg" alt="z-image"></a></p>
<h3 class="relative group flex items-baseline">
	<a id="🌟-key-features" class="block pr-1.5 text-lg md:absolute md:p-1.5 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 md:right-full" href="#🌟-key-features" rel="nofollow">
		<span class="header-link"><svg class="text-gray-500 hover:text-black dark:hover:text-gray-200 w-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="1em" height="1em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 256 256"><path d="M167.594 88.393a8.001 8.001 0 0 1 0 11.314l-67.882 67.882a8 8 0 1 1-11.314-11.315l67.882-67.881a8.003 8.003 0 0 1 11.314 0zm-28.287 84.86l-28.284 28.284a40 40 0 0 1-56.567-56.567l28.284-28.284a8 8 0 0 0-11.315-11.315l-28.284 28.284a56 56 0 0 0 79.196 79.197l28.285-28.285a8 8 0 1 0-11.315-11.314zM212.852 43.14a56.002 56.002 0 0 0-79.196 0l-28.284 28.284a8 8 0 1 0 11.314 11.314l28.284-28.284a40 40 0 0 1 56.568 56.567l-28.285 28.285a8 8 0 0 0 11.315 11.314l28.284-28.284a56.065 56.065 0 0 0 0-79.196z" fill="currentColor"></path></svg></span>
	</a>
	<span>
		🌟 Key Features
	</span>
</h3>
<ul>
<li><strong>Undistilled Foundation</strong>: As a non-distilled base model, Z-Image preserves the complete training signal. It supports full Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG), providing the precision required for complex prompt engineering and professional workflows.</li>
<li><strong>Aesthetic Versatility</strong>: Z-Image masters a vast spectrum of visual languages—from hyper-realistic photography and cinematic digital art to intricate anime and stylized illustrations. It is the ideal engine for scenarios requiring rich, multi-dimensional expression.</li>
<li><strong>Enhanced Output Diversity</strong>: Built for exploration, Z-Image delivers significantly higher variability in composition, facial identity, and lighting across different seeds, ensuring that multi-person scenes remain distinct and dynamic.</li>
<li><strong>Built for Development</strong>: The ideal starting point for the community. Its non-distilled nature makes it a good base for LoRA training, structural conditioning (ControlNet) and semantic conditioning.</li>
<li><strong>Robust Negative Control</strong>: Responds with high fidelity to negative prompting, allowing users to reliably suppress artifacts and adjust compositions.</li>
</ul>

	<span>
		Recommended Parameters
	</span>
</h3>
<ul>
<li><strong>Resolution:</strong> 512×512 to 2048×2048 (total pixel area, any aspect ratio)</li>
<li><strong>Guidance scale:</strong> 3.0 – 5.0</li>
<li><strong>Inference steps:</strong> 28 – 50</li>
</ul>

	<a id="usage-example" class="block pr-1.5 text-lg md:absolute md:p-1.5 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 md:right-full" href="#usage-example" rel="nofollow">
		<span class="header-link"><svg class="text-gray-500 hover:text-black dark:hover:text-gray-200 w-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="1em" height="1em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 256 256"><path d="M167.594 88.393a8.001 8.001 0 0 1 0 11.314l-67.882 67.882a8 8 0 1 1-11.314-11.315l67.882-67.881a8.003 8.003 0 0 1 11.314 0zm-28.287 84.86l-28.284 28.284a40 40 0 0 1-56.567-56.567l28.284-28.284a8 8 0 0 0-11.315-11.315l-28.284 28.284a56 56 0 0 0 79.196 79.197l28.285-28.285a8 8 0 1 0-11.315-11.314zM212.852 43.14a56.002 56.002 0 0 0-79.196 0l-28.284 28.284a8 8 0 1 0 11.314 11.314l28.284-28.284a40 40 0 0 1 56.568 56.567l-28.285 28.285a8 8 0 0 0 11.315 11.314l28.284-28.284a56.065 56.065 0 0 0 0-79.196z" fill="currentColor"></path></svg></span>
	</a>
	<span>
		Usage Example
	</span>
</h3>
<div class="relative group repo-copy-code"><pre><code class="language-python"><span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> torch
<span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> diffusers <span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> ZImagePipeline

<span class="hljs-comment"># Load the pipeline</span>
pipe = ZImagePipeline.from_pretrained(
    <span class="hljs-string">"Tongyi-MAI/Z-Image"</span>,
    torch_dtype=torch.bfloat16,
    low_cpu_mem_usage=<span class="hljs-literal">False</span>,
)
pipe.to(<span class="hljs-string">"cuda"</span>)

<span class="hljs-comment"># Generate image</span>
prompt = <span class="hljs-string">"两名年轻亚裔女性紧密站在一起，背景为朴素的灰色纹理墙面，可能是室内地毯地面。左侧女性留着长卷发，身穿藏青色毛衣，左袖有奶油色褶皱装饰，内搭白色立领衬衫，下身白色裤子；佩戴小巧金色耳钉，双臂交叉于背后。右侧女性留直肩长发，身穿奶油色卫衣，胸前印有“Tun the tables”字样，下方为“New ideas”，搭配白色裤子；佩戴银色小环耳环，双臂交叉于胸前。两人均面带微笑直视镜头。照片，自然光照明，柔和阴影，以藏青、奶油白为主的中性色调，休闲时尚摄影，中等景深，面部和上半身对焦清晰，姿态放松，表情友好，室内环境，地毯地面，纯色背景。"</span>
negative_prompt = <span class="hljs-string">""</span> <span class="hljs-comment"># Optional, but would be powerful when you want to remove some unwanted content</span>

image = pipe(
    prompt=prompt,
    negative_prompt=negative_prompt,
    height=<span class="hljs-number">1280</span>,
    width=<span class="hljs-number">720</span>,
    cfg_normalization=<span class="hljs-literal">False</span>,
    num_inference_steps=<span class="hljs-number">50</span>,
    guidance_scale=<span class="hljs-number">4</span>,
    generator=torch.Generator(<span class="hljs-string">"cuda"</span>).manual_seed(<span class="hljs-number">42</span>),
).images[<span class="hljs-number">0</span>]

image.save(<span class="hljs-string">"example.png"</span>)
</code></pre><button class="absolute top-3 right-3 transition opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-80"><svg class="" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" role="img" width="0.9em" height="0.9em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 32 32"><path d="M28,10V28H10V10H28m0-2H10a2,2,0,0,0-2,2V28a2,2,0,0,0,2,2H28a2,2,0,0,0,2-2V10a2,2,0,0,0-2-2Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><path d="M4,18H2V4A2,2,0,0,1,4,2H18V4H4Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><rect fill="none" width="32" height="32"></rect></svg></button></div>
